message.body: Good good, I'm close to 100% coinstack 1000

i played thru impossible needle with no saves
ok i acc have a question
that they like the double jump
1. you're a bad dev 2. you're a bad dev
it's not super messed up i dont think
but needle is super different from regular needle with it
ok listen. if 2 of your games have a gimmick which is incorporated poorly, it's prolly not that great of a gimmick 😭
IF ITS IGNORED 90% OF THE TIME
if the game implements it well, it will be regarded as unique in a good way
but the problem with the 2 games ive played from you, the gimmick barely exists, and by the time you need it, you have forgotten about it
either way, my thin body allows slop
i can see why you'd want a unique aspect to all your games, but if you do do that, you should at least try making it used more. if not, it's better to just not have it in some games imo
CAN WE STOP CALLING IT COYOTE TIME BTW
other people dont know what they're talking about
u can call it persistent coyote time
she can ctrl c + del the code for it
"ye but like, i dont know" yup go on
bad dev alert 🚨 bad dev alert 🚨
back then, we called gates inverted inverts sometimes
look honestly, you just need to use it better on average if you wanna keep it
if you're using it poorly in 2 games, you're bad at using it
it should be used well in all your games, or not implemented in the few that dont use it 😭
you can't have a mechanic that goes against the player's expectations, and get them to utilize it without actually making them use it
that's slightly different tho. in fanthology it was used, but only late into the game by the time you have already forgotten about it
but even in save point, it wasnt used extremely often
during work, i couldnt help myself but randomly think of: I TOLD YOU MAN THE DEVIL
celeste has an 8 way dash which is not common at all, but it's not forgettable as it's actually used in the game
i dont disagree with your reasoning, i just think your implementation of it could be done better
im def being harsher than i need to be lmao, sorry

so even though everyone knows everything, you are still forced to use natural language
